programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy lands her dream internship with a top fashion designer in New York -- but then unexpectedly turns it down; Vanessa and Mike want to know what changed her mind.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: During the grand opening of The Outdoor Man Grill, Kristin feels like Ed is undermining her role as manager; Eve tries to distance herself from a childhood friend who appears to have a crush on her.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa sets Eve up with a student -- not realizing that Eve may already be dating someone; Chuck and Mike think Eve is seeing Chuck's son.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
programme.desc: Andi gets Bev a spot volunteering at the hospital; Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim panics when his son becomes a Green Bay Packers fan, and he tries to convert him to a Chicago Bears fan.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim feels guilty after cheating at a church's fund-raising bingo game.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl's friend gets expensive jewelry from her husband as gifts for no reason, Cheryl expects Jim to do the same; Jim finds these to be unreasonable requests and doubts the husband's intentions.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim encourages Gracie and Ruby to open a lemonade stand but does not anticipate fierce competition from a neighbor kid's stand.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Much to Tim's chagrin, Wilson would rather spend time with his niece than restore the Studebaker she gave him.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) is asked out on a date and realizes her 18-year marriage has lost some spark and romance. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) questions God's existence, which prompts Tim (Tim Allen) to visit the Rev. Mike (guest star Dan Aykroyd).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylors celebrate Thanksgiving with a Hollywood producer at a Detroit Lions football game. Guest stars: Rodney Dangerfield, Alex Rocco and Tom Poston.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Chuck and Mike debate the merits of an inner city school merging with a high school in an upscale neighborhood; Boyd's Halloween costume -- a lump of coal -- reminds Vanessa of her job's potential impact on the environment.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike gives Mandy advice on how to set aside money for paying taxes, but she decides to do things her own way.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike gets caught between Kristin and Ryan when it's discovered that Boyd was never vaccinated against chicken pox.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mindy worries about Kyle's safety after he gets in an accident; Ed makes an unexpected announcement; Eve plays with her high school football team.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric tries his hand at vandalism; Red buys a local muffler shop; Kelso's daughter gives him a newfound respect for women.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: After Red offers him a job, Hyde must choose between working with Red or his real father; Fez gets a job as a shampoo boy at the local beauty shop.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: With an empty nest, Kitty decides on a course of self-improvement; Eric decides he wants to be an artist; Hyde learns the joys of business attire.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric encourages the gang to pull a prank on a crazy neighbor; Kitty takes a magazine quiz and learns that she has low self-esteem; Bob accuses Midge of flirting with W.B.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With a Plan

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Lionesses teach their cubs how to survive by showing them how to tackle giant buffalo; burrowing owls provide an underground nest for their chicks and mimic rattlesnakes' sound to protect them.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Colin Stafford-Johnson explores Ireland's west coast and wildlife, including humpback whales, eagles, salmon and red deer stags.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Colin Stafford-Johnson explores Ireland's west coast and wildlife, including humpback whales, eagles, salmon and red deer stags.

programme.title: Big Pacific
programme.desc: The quest to multiply includes an array of unusual behaviors and adaptations by forest penguins, great white sharks and other species; male pregnancy.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Hayley Mills and Stephen Tompkinson go head to head in an antiques challenge; they drive around the Northeast in a vintage E Type Jaguar and a Rolls Royce; the "Wild at Heart" co-stars seek expert guidance as they visit antique shops.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Big Bird reassures Henrietta Pussycat about her friendship with X the Owl.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Francine's Pilfered Paper; Buster Gets Real
programme.desc: Francine copies and pastes information from a Web site to use as her school report; everyone loves the new reality-TV series except Arthur.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: When the Wild Kratts team embarks on a pirate adventure in the Indian Ocean, they discover a very strange, worldly castaway.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.sub-title: Through Rain, Sun, Snow or Hail
programme.desc: Benny becomes enamored with the mail carrier, and wonders how she delivers the mail in different weather conditions.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke clean Stu without a bath; Lyla and Ale find a way to protect the callaloo plants from stink bugs.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Plushie Collection; The Bouncy Ball Collection
programme.desc: Carl turns to his friends to help him organize his plushie collection; Carl loses his bouncy ball collection.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Plays T-ball; Max Plays at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends play T-ball and find that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Jay and Lupe use wayfinding signs to track down Phoebe; Pete and Craig face an epic hoops battle on the courts.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Mia learns how to sing a song in Spanish on Song Day on Sesame Street.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Moo Moo Choo Choo; Lake Bellyflop
programme.desc: Wombats unstick a stuck train; the group goes to Bellyflop Lake.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: The Cow and Potato Bug Opera; Everything Explorers
programme.desc: Donkey is excited about directing a new show starring all her pals; Donkey and Panda discover a surprise spider.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Book; Rosie's New Club
programme.desc: Iggy wants to see the garbage truck, but Rosie doesn't know how to get it to come to their house; Rosie attempts to bring nature inside.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma and friends look for coquí frogs; Alma helps André complete a chalk masterpiece.
